DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES
Gabriel Markoff, Esq. (628.652.4240; gabriel.markoff@sfgov.org) Assistant District Attorney, Special Prosecutions of San Francisco District Attorney's Office for The People.
Hoon Chum, Esq. (213.257.2458; HChun@da.lacounty.gov) Head Deputy District Attorney Consumer Protection Division of Los Angeles County District Attorney's Office for The People.
David Darnell, Esq. (714.241.4444; ddarnell@callahan-law.com) of Callahan & Blane APLC for Defendants.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Diane Freeman, CSR 5884 (415.971.4171; diane@freemanreporting.com). =(302/CEK)

Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. GABRIEL MARKOFF, Esq. and EVAN H. ACKIRON, Esq. of the San Francisco District Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-551-9560) for plaintiff;
Atty. DAVID J. DARNELL, Esq. of Callahan & Blaine, APLC (Tel: 714-241-4444) for defendants (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING ON STATUS AS TO WHETHER CASE IS MAINTAINED BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

The Court grants plaintiff's C.C.P. Sec. 170.6 peremptory challenge against Judge Richard B. Ulmer Jr.

The clerk communicates to the parties that, per Presiding Judge Feng, the hearing on defendants' demurrer is continued to August 26, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge Curtis Karnow.

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Attys. GABRIEL MARKOFF, Esq. of San Francisco City and County District Attorney's Office (Tel: 628-652-4240) and HOON CHUN, Esq. of Los Angeles County District Attorney's Office (Tel: 213-257-2458) for the People (Mr. Chun appearing via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. DAVID J. DARNELL, Esq. of Callahan & Blaine, APLC (Tel: 714-241-4444) for defendants (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS POTTER HANDY LLP, MARK POTTER, RUSSELL HANDY, DENNIS PRICE, CHRISTOPHER SEABOCK, AMANDA SEABOCK, CHRISTINA CARSON, PRATHIMA PRICE, RAYMOND BALLISTER JR., ELLIOTT MONTGOMERY, BRADLEY SMITH, JOSIE ZIMMERMAN, TEHNIAT ZAMAN, ISABEL MASANQUE, FAYTHE GUTIERREZ, AND PHYL GRACE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Case is continued to August 4, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 for status as to whether case is maintained by the District Attorney.

If the People inform the Court that the case is maintained, at the August 4th status hearing, the Court will then set a future hearing date on the demurrer.
